chapter_title.en: Chapter 96 – The safety of the Religion

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/161)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/161)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَوَقاهُ اللَّهُ سَيِّئاتِ ما مَكَرُوا فَقَالَ أَمَا لَقَدْ بَسَطُوا عَلَيْهِ وَ قَتَلُوهُ وَ لَكِنْ أَ تَدْرُونَ مَا وَقَاهُ وَقَاهُ أَنْ يَفْتِنُوهُ فِي دِينِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Numan, from Ayoub Bin Al Hurr,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [40:45] So Allah Saved him from the evil of what they planned. Heasws said: ‘But, they had extended (their hands) upon him, and killed him, but do you know what Heazwj Saved him (from)? Heazwj Saved him from their strife in his Religion’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from Ayyub ibn al-Hurr from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “About the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, ‘Allah protected him against their evil plans. . . .,’ [40:45] the Imam said, ‘In fact, they perpetrated and murdered him but do you know what was protected? He (Allah) protected him against confusion in his religion.’”
